brand_dna.category: Performance beauty and cosmetics - makeup engineered to last through sweat and motion for active women.
brand_dna.core_belief: Confidence should carry you from morning to night - you never have to sit still to look pretty.
proof_points: Founded by WNBA star Lexie Hull and former Stanford roommate Sarah Guller
Setting spray is sweat-tested by professional athletes
Latex-free foam sponge, cleansable and reusable
brand_dna.positioning: A focused, athlete-built beauty line that plays performance-first against traditional sit-still makeup brands.

voice_pillars.name: Built for Motion
voice_pillars.desc: Every line ties beauty to an active, non-stop life instead of stillness or vanity.
voice_pillars.quote: Built for Motion. Refined for Beauty.

voice_pillars.name: Empowering and Bold
voice_pillars.desc: Speaks to confidence and strength, positioning the customer as unstoppable.
voice_pillars.quote: feel empowered, fresh, and unstoppable no matter what your schedule holds

voice_pillars.name: Playfully Confident
voice_pillars.desc: Short, punchy, attitude-forward copy that reframes what makeup is for.
voice_pillars.quote: You don't have to sit still to look pretty.

voice_pillars.name: Performance-Proof
voice_pillars.desc: Backs claims with concrete, tested performance language rather than fluff.

phrases: never feels tight, sticky, or heavy
designed to last through sweat, movement
a seamless, natural finish that never looks cakey
confidence should carry you from morning to night

icp: Active women who train, work long days, and stay on the move, and who want makeup that keeps up without constant reapplication.

personas.name: The Athlete-on-the-Go
personas.description: Trains hard and lives in motion - moved by proof that makeup survives sweat and workouts.

personas.name: The Busy Professional
personas.description: Runs from long workdays into nights out - moved by all-day 16-hour wear that never needs a touch-up.

personas.name: The Founder-Loyal Fan
personas.description: Follows Lexie Hull and women-led sports brands - moved by the athlete origin story and community angle.

offers: Free shipping on orders $40 and above
Damaged or defective item replacement within 30 days of receipt
Email waitlist signup for new launches

allowed.source: Lock & Go Setting Spray product page
Lock & Go Setting Spray product page
Lock & Go Setting Spray product page

allowed.claim: Locks makeup in place with an ultra-light, flexible finish that never feels tight, sticky, or heavy
allowed.source: Lock & Go Setting Spray product page

allowed.claim: Latex-free foam sponge for a seamless, natural finish that never looks cakey
Founded by WNBA star Lexie Hull and Stanford roommate Sarah Guller

banned.why: Cosmetics may not claim to repair or heal - that implies drug-level structure/function effect.
Non-comedogenic is fine, but treating acne is a drug claim not permitted for a cosmetic.
Structure/function claim that turns a cosmetic into an unapproved drug.

banned.claim: Anti-aging that reverses signs of aging
banned.why: Reversing aging is a structure/function claim; use appearance language like 'looks smoother'.
No study provided - 'clinically proven' cannot be used without a real supporting study.

banned.claim: Hydrating formula that permanently restores skin moisture barrier
banned.why: Barrier restoration is a structure/function drug claim; keep to surface hydration/appearance.
